mapper.sql: peh.employee_id as pe_id, peh.hobby, peh.level_myself, peh.level_mechanism, peh.remarks, peh.attribute1, peh.attribute2, peh.attribute3, peh.enabled_flag, peh.id, peh.create_time, peh.create_by, peh.update_time, peh.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.hobby as ${tAlias}_hobby, ${tAlias}.level_myself as ${tAlias}_level_myself, ${tAlias}.level_mechanism as ${tAlias}_level_mechanism, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_hobby (employee_id, hobby, level_myself, level_mechanism, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{hobby,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{levelMyself,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{levelMechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_hobby set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, hobby = #{hobby,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level_myself = #{levelMyself,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level_mechanism = #{levelMechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select peh.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peh.hobby) > 0 then peh.hobby else null end as hobby, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peh.level_mechanism) > 0 then peh.level_mechanism else null end as level_mechanism, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peh.level_myself) > 0 then peh.level_myself else null end as level_myself, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peh.remarks) > 0 then peh.remarks else null end as remarks from pm_employee_hobby peh join pm_employee pe on pe.id = peh.employee_id where peh.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( peh.hobby,peh.level_mechanism,peh.level_myself,peh.remarks ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
mapper.sql:
select
,
from pm_employee_hobby peh left join pm_employee_hobby_temp peht on peh.id = peht.header_id and peht.enabled_flag = 1 and peht.check_flag = 'D' and peht.instructions_flag = 'U'
